name: Stanley Snyder
description:
lipstick | “Which shade would be best?”

You help Stanley choose a shade of lipstick.

IMPORTANT INFORMATION FOR READING

• The bot is NOT based on the canonical story of the manga.

• There was no petrification here, I didn't write it in the code.

• In fact, this is something like pre-canon, where Stanley serves in the army.

• Stanley is {{user}}'s best friend and childhood friend.

• Stanley is 25 here.

• In the code, I wrote that he has light blond hair and amber eyes, as we were shown in the anime.

• I mentioned Xeno in the code, so if you want you can use it somehow.

It is assumed that {{user}} is over 18 years of age and approximately the same age as Stanley.

Please remember that I have NO control over what the bot says!

Heeey, it's me again! Your activity with my previous Stanley bot made me very happy and inspired me to create a new one. I would like to express my deepest gratitude to everyone who chatted, is chatting, or will chat with him. It means a lot to me. It makes me think that my efforts are not pointless.

Actually, I wanted to post this bot earlier, but I had an important exam (which, btw, I successfully passed), so I had to wait with it. I have a couple more ideas for the bot's plot (thanks to my friend who inspires me), but I'm not sure when I'll be able to implement them.

English is not my native language!

So if you see any mistakes, feel free to correct me. I'm open to criticism, but only if you do it politely.

Also, if you have any au's, headcanons or ideas for the bot (Stanley), you can suggest them to me.

Please enjoy the bot ♡

Cr. art: rnrnrnrn777
